parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: Optional audit-period start. Omitted dates select the previous 30 completed UTC days; an explicit range may not exceed 180 days.

parameters.name: endTime
parameters.description: Optional audit-period end. Omitted dates select the previous 30 completed UTC days; an explicit range may not exceed 180 days.

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: Optional audit-period start. Omitted dates select the previous 30 completed UTC days; an explicit range may not exceed 180 days.

parameters.name: endTime
parameters.description: Optional audit-period end. Omitted dates select the previous 30 completed UTC days; an explicit range may not exceed 180 days.

502.description: Upstream dependency failed while fulfilling the request (502)
Upstream dependency failed while fulfilling the request (502)
Upstream dependency failed while fulfilling the request (502)

202.description: A runner lifecycle action was accepted and continues asynchronously.
A runner lifecycle action was accepted and continues asynchronously.

Common.Attribute.description: Key-value attribute pair following OTel conventions

Common.AttributeBytesValue.description: Base64 bytes projected by qyl without colliding with an ordinary string attribute.

Common.AttributeKeyValueListValue.description: Recursive OTLP key-value-list projected as a JSON object.

Common.AttributeValue.description: Lossless JSON projection of an OpenTelemetry AnyValue attribute.

dependency.description: Stable dependency category; never contains raw exception text

Common.Errors.BadGatewayError.description: Upstream dependency failed while fulfilling the request (502)

resource_type.description: The type of resource that was not found

resource_id.description: The identifier that was not found

type.description: A URI reference identifying the problem type

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type

status.description: The HTTP status code (informational only, actual code set by subtype)

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence

instance.description: A URI reference identifying the specific occurrence

Common.Errors.ProblemDetails.description: RFC 7807 Problem Details for HTTP APIs

rejected_value.description: The rejected value (if safe to include)

name.description: Name of the instrumentation scope (library name)

Common.InstrumentationScope.description: Instrumentation scope identifying the library/component emitting telemetry

Common.MacAddress.description: MAC address in colon-separated hex notation

cursor.description: Opaque cursor for fetching the next page

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return (1-1000)

since.description: Include historical data from this timestamp

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return

Common.SpanId.description: Unique span identifier (16 lowercase hex characters)

Common.TraceId.description: Unique trace identifier (32 lowercase hex characters)

Common.TraceParent.description: W3C Trace Context traceparent header format

Common.TraceState.description: W3C Trace Context tracestate header (vendor-specific key-value pairs)

Common.UnixNanos.description: Unsigned Unix timestamp in nanoseconds since epoch

cluster_id.description: Stable identifier derived from the privacy-safe cluster dimensions.

workflow_key.description: Privacy-safe derived grouping identity used to group repeated calls.

span_name.description: Present only when an upstream source proves or canonicalizes a low-cardinality, privacy-safe span name.

catalog_token_estimate.description: Outcome and, when calculated, detailed current-catalog token-and-request estimate for this cluster. Aggregate provider billing is never attributed to a cluster.

measurable_coverage.description: Fraction of calls with a task-specific correctness signal.

safe_deferral_coverage.description: Fraction of calls proven safe to route to a residual path.

candidate_status.description: Evidence status qualifying the proposed candidate path.

validation_metrics.description: Task-specific metrics required to falsify the proposed replacement.

Cost.GenAiEtlAuditCluster.description: Observed economics and evidence for one repeated GenAI workflow cluster.

Cost.GenAiEtlAuditEvaluationRequest.description: Batch of cluster scenarios evaluated against one audit period.

Cost.GenAiEtlAuditEvaluationResponse.description: Batch result for ETL replacement scenarios.

billing_sources.description: Provider-owned aggregate billing sources. These totals are not attributed to clusters or used as evaluation baselines.

catalog_sources.description: Configured live model catalog sources and their current synchronization state.

Cost.GenAiEtlAuditReport.description: Trace-level ETL audit for a bounded period.

estimated_catalog_token_cost_usd.description: Counterfactual token and request cost of the full observed audit population before the cluster response limit is applied, using the current live catalog snapshot; this is not an official billed total or a historical price claim.

catalog_token_priced_call_coverage.description: Fraction of observed calls covered by all-or-nothing calculated token-and-request estimates; missing pricing is not treated as zero.

estimated_token_economic_concentration.description: Returned top-cluster token-and-request estimate divided by estimated_catalog_token_cost_usd for the full observed audit population.

measurable_coverage.description: Fraction of calls with a task-specific correctness signal.

safe_deferral_coverage.description: Fraction of calls proven safe to defer to a residual path.

candidate_etl_estimated_token_spend_shar.description: Fraction of estimated current-catalog token-and-request spend attached to ETL-shaped candidates.

Cost.GenAiEtlAuditSummary.description: Aggregate trace-level economics for the requested audit period.

net_replaceable_value_usd.description: Net period value; this may be negative when maintenance or error cost exceeds gross savings.

Cost.GenAiEtlCandidatePath.description: Lowest-risk implementation class suggested by currently available evidence.

Cost.GenAiEtlCandidateStatus.description: Evidence status of the proposed replacement path.

estimated_catalog_token_cost_usd.description: Estimated token and request cost for the reported cluster period using the current catalog snapshot; this is counterfactual for historical periods and is not an official billed total.

estimated_catalog_token_cost_per_call_us.description: Estimated token and request cost per observed cluster call; this is not an official billed total.

provenance.description: Exact catalog snapshot and model-match evidence.

components.description: Included token or request usage and rate contributions. Ordered source overrides carry conditional evidence; ordinary inclusive subtype replacements do not require it.

exclusions.description: Meters or conditional adjustments explicitly omitted from this calculated estimate.

Cost.GenAiEtlCatalogTokenCalculatedEstim.description: Calculated all-or-nothing current-catalog token and request estimate for a complete workflow cluster.

catalog_provenance.description: Exact live-catalog snapshot and model-match evidence used for the calculated frontier cost.

Cost.GenAiEtlCatalogTokenCostEstimate.description: All-or-nothing current-catalog token and request estimate. The status literal selects the complete calculated or fail-closed response shape.

exclusions.description: Available meter or conditional evidence explaining why the cluster estimate failed closed.

Cost.GenAiEtlClusterEvaluation.description: Result of replaceable_value = calls * coverage * (frontier - alternative) - maintenance - error. The frontier_cost_basis literal selects a complete calculated result or a fail-closed unavailable result.

coverage.description: Fraction of cluster calls the replacement is expected to serve safely.

frontier_cost_per_call_usd.description: Explicit scenario baseline cost per call. It wins over a calculated catalog estimate; when both are absent, evaluation fails closed.

Cost.GenAiEtlClusterScenario.description: What-if assumptions for one workflow cluster over the requested period.

Cost.GenAiEtlEvidenceSignal.description: Observable evidence needed to promote an inferred replacement safely.

Cost.GenAiEtlFrontierCostBasis.description: Evidence basis for the frontier cost used in a replacement-value calculation.

Cost.GenAiEtlOutputContract.description: Machine-readable output contract inferred for a workflow cluster.

reason.description: Stable evidence code explaining the current gate state.

Cost.GenAiEtlPromotionGateKind.description: Promotion gate from replay through limited serving and rollback.

Cost.GenAiEtlPromotionGateState.description: Evaluation state of a promotion gate.

Cost.GenAiEtlResidualPath.description: Fallback used for requests outside a promoted replacement's safe coverage.

Cost.GenAiEtlTaskFamily.description: Task family inferred for a repeated GenAI workflow cluster.

Cost.GenAiEtlValidationMetric.description: Task-specific metrics that can falsify a proposed replacement.

Cost.ModelCatalogBillingMode.description: How a catalog rate charges its measured quantity.

source_billing_mode.description: Source-specific billing mode retained from the catalog or deterministically derived from the provider-defined meter.

billing_mode.description: Normalized billing mode when qyl recognizes the conditional source meter; absent when the source meter has no supported normalization.

rate_evidence.description: The ordered source override that was not applied or was superseded.

unit_price_usd.description: Catalog rate omitted from the estimate, when the source supplied one.

source_order.description: One-based position of this override in the source response; later matching overrides win. Tier zero is reserved for the published base rate and is not a source override.

condition_usage_dimension.description: Observed per-call usage dimension evaluated by the source condition.

exclusive_minimum_quantity.description: Exclusive minimum quantity declared by the source condition.

observed_per_call_quantity.description: Observed per-call quantity compared with the exclusive minimum.

Cost.ModelCatalogConditionalRateEvidence.description: Ordered evidence proving whether a conditional catalog override applied to an observed request quantity.

Cost.ModelCatalogExclusionRateEvidence.description: Relation-specific evidence for a catalog rate omitted from a token-and-request estimate. The rate_relation literal selects the required target and ordered evidence shape.

replaces_usage_dimension.description: Inclusive base usage dimension replaced by this subtype rate.

conditional_evidence.description: Ordered evidence when a source override altered the selected subtype rate.

Cost.ModelCatalogMatchKind.description: Deterministic exact match used to resolve an observed model identity to a catalog record. Fuzzy, prefix, suffix, date, and alias matching are not permitted.

Cost.ModelCatalogObservedIdentityBasis.description: Telemetry attribute used as the observed model identity for an exact catalog match.

billing_mode.description: Normalized billing mode when qyl recognizes the source meter; absent when the source meter has no supported normalization.

source_id.description: Unique stable identifier of the configured catalog source.

source_endpoint.description: Configured API endpoint from which the catalog was retrieved.

snapshot_id.description: Content-addressed identifier of the exact catalog snapshot used for this estimate.

price_model_id.description: Exact model identifier selected from the source catalog.

observed_model_id.description: Exact observed telemetry value compared with the selected catalog record.

retrieved_at.description: UTC time when the current catalog snapshot used for this counterfactual estimate was retrieved. For historical audit periods, this is not evidence of the price that applied historically.

Cost.ModelCatalogPriceProvenance.description: Provenance for the live catalog rates used to estimate one cluster.

Cost.ModelCatalogPriceSemantics.description: How a live catalog rate was selected when estimating cluster cost.

replaces_usage_dimension.description: Published usage dimension whose prior base, surcharge, or subtype rate was replaced.

Cost.ModelCatalogRateRelation.description: How a selected catalog rate relates to the source's published base rate for the same component.

source_id.description: Unique stable identifier of the configured catalog source.

priority.description: Configured source priority used for deterministic selection when multiple current catalogs match. Zero is highest priority; lower values win.

price_semantics.description: Rate-selection semantics published by this source's active snapshot.

source_endpoint.description: Configured API endpoint used to fetch the live model catalog.

last_attempt_at.description: UTC time of the latest fetch attempt.

last_verified_at.description: UTC time when the source was last verified successfully, including a verification that retained unchanged content.

retrieved_at.description: UTC time when the content of the currently retained catalog snapshot was retrieved.

active_snapshot_id.description: Content-addressed identifier of the catalog snapshot currently used for estimates.

model_count.description: Number of model records in the active catalog snapshot.

failure_category.description: Stable, non-sensitive failure category for the last attempt.

Cost.ModelCatalogSource.description: Synchronization metadata for one configurable live model catalog source.

Cost.ModelCatalogSourceOrder.description: One-based position of a conditional override in its source response.

Cost.ModelCatalogSourceStatus.description: Current synchronization state for a configured live model catalog.

replaces_usage_dimension.description: Published usage dimension whose prior base, surcharge, or subtype rate was replaced.

Cost.ModelCatalogTokenEstimateComponent.description: One evidenced token or request component contributing to a current-catalog estimate. The rate_relation literal selects the required evidence shape.

component.description: Source-defined pricing component, such as prompt, completion, request, cache read, cache write, or internal reasoning.

usage_dimension.description: Qyl-observed usage dimension to which this rate was applied, such as input_tokens or output_tokens.

unit.description: Source-declared unit represented by the rate.

source_billing_mode.description: Source-specific billing mode retained from the catalog or deterministically derived from the provider-defined meter.

quantity.description: Measured quantity to which the catalog unit price was applied.

unit_price_usd.description: Catalog price in USD per source-defined unit.

estimated_cost_usd.description: Estimated USD contribution of this component for the reported cluster period.

Cost.ModelCatalogTokenEstimateComponentB.description: Fields shared by every included token or request pricing component.

Cost.ModelCatalogTokenEstimateExclusion.description: Auditable catalog meter or conditional adjustment excluded from a token-and-request estimate. The reason literal selects the required evidence shape.

source_billing_mode.description: Source-specific billing mode retained from the catalog or deterministically derived from the provider-defined meter, including unsupported modes.

rate_evidence.description: Relation, replacement target, and ordered override evidence for the omitted rate.

unit_price_usd.description: Catalog rate omitted from the estimate, when the source supplied one.

Cost.ModelCatalogTokenEstimateExclusionB.description: Fields shared by every catalog meter or conditional adjustment excluded from a token-and-request estimate.

Cost.ModelCatalogTokenExclusionReason.description: Why a catalog meter or conditional adjustment was not included in a token-and-request estimate.

replaces_usage_dimension.description: Inclusive base usage dimension replaced by this subtype rate.

conditional_evidence.description: Ordered override evidence when the source conditionally altered this subtype rate.

billing_mode.description: Normalized billing mode when the source mode has a partial known mapping; absent when no supported normalization exists.

Cost.ProviderBillingAttribution.description: Granularity at which official provider-billed cost can be attributed to telemetry.

provider.description: Canonical GenAI provider or cloud billing system name.

source_endpoint.description: Official provider-owned API endpoint used for the fetch.

attribution.description: Attribution granularity supported by this source response.

last_attempt_at.description: UTC time of the latest fetch attempt.

last_success_at.description: UTC time of the latest successful fetch.

period_start.description: Start of the provider billing period.

period_end.description: End of the provider billing period.

currency_code.description: ISO 4217 currency code returned by the provider.

reported_cost_usd.description: Cost returned by the provider for this period, converted from provider-declared USD units without rate inference.

model.description: Model identifier returned by the provider when the source supports it.

failure_category.description: Stable, non-sensitive failure category for the last attempt.

Cost.ProviderBillingSource.description: Provenance for billed cost data fetched directly from a provider-owned API.

Cost.ProviderBillingSourceStatus.description: Current synchronization state for a provider-owned billing source.

services.description: Service names observed in this session

Domains.Observe.Session.SessionEntity.description: Complete session entity with aggregated data

Health.HealthReport.description: Readiness or liveness report returned by /health and /alive.

Health.HealthStatus.description: Health state reported by a qyl-managed process.

Mcp.Tools.FetchTelemetryInput.description: Input for the app-only fetch_telemetry tool.

Mcp.Tools.FetchTelemetryOutput.description: Structured output for the app-only fetch_telemetry tool.

Mcp.Tools.FetchTelemetryView.description: Data projection requested by the app-only fetch_telemetry tool.

Mcp.Tools.McpDashboardStats.description: Aggregate MCP traffic statistics shown by qyl.mcp.

Mcp.Tools.McpDataMode.description: Whether a qyl MCP tool read live collector data or the explicit demo dataset.

OTel.Enums.InstrumentKind.description: Metric instrument kinds per OTel specification

OTel.Enums.OriginalPayloadFormat.description: Original payload format for profile data

OTel.Enums.ProfileFrameType.description: Profile frame type — interpreter or compiler of a single frame

OTel.Enums.SeverityNumber.description: Log severity number following OTel specification (1-24)

OTel.Enums.SpanFlags.description: Span flags as defined in W3C Trace Context

OTel.Enums.SpanKind.description: Span kind describing the relationship between spans

OTel.Logs.LogBody.description: Log body content - can be string, structured, or bytes

time_unix_nano.description: Timestamp when the event occurred (nanoseconds since epoch)

observed_time_unix_nano.description: Timestamp when the log was observed/collected (nanoseconds since epoch)

severity_text.description: Severity text (DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR, etc.)

resource.description: Resource describing the entity that produced this log

offset.description: Index of the first bucket count.

OTel.Metrics.ExponentialHistogramBuckets.description: Bucket range used by an OTLP exponential histogram data point.

OTel.Metrics.MetricDoubleValue.description: A floating-point measurement value from an OTLP number data point or exemplar.

OTel.Metrics.MetricExemplar.description: A sampled measurement linked to the trace or span active when it was recorded.

OTel.Metrics.MetricInt64.description: An OTLP signed 64-bit metric integer encoded as a decimal JSON string.

OTel.Metrics.MetricIntegerValue.description: An integer measurement value from an OTLP number data point or exemplar.

OTel.Metrics.MetricNumberValue.description: The exactly-one numeric value carried by an OTLP number data point or exemplar.

OTel.Metrics.MetricPoint.description: One persisted OTLP metric data point, discriminated by aggregation kind.

metadata.description: Non-identifying metadata attached to the OTLP metric descriptor.

attributes.description: Attributes identifying this metric time series.

flags.description: OTLP data-point flags preserved as an extensible bit field.

resource.description: Resource describing the entity that produced the metric.

OTel.Metrics.MetricPointBase.description: Fields shared by every persisted OTLP metric data point.

OTel.Metrics.MetricStartUnixNanos.description: An optional OTLP metric start timestamp in Unix nanoseconds, encoded as a decimal JSON string.

OTel.Metrics.MetricUInt64.description: An OTLP unsigned 64-bit metric count encoded as a decimal JSON string.

OTel.Metrics.MetricUnixNanos.description: A non-zero OTLP metric or exemplar timestamp in Unix nanoseconds.

OTel.Metrics.SummaryQuantileValue.description: A quantile and value reported by an OTLP summary data point.

sample_type.description: Sample type describing what was measured

time_unix_nano.description: Profile start timestamp in nanoseconds since epoch

original_payload.description: Original payload bytes (base64 encoded, opaque — not parsed)

resource.description: Resource describing the entity that produced this profile

OTel.Profiles.Profile.description: OpenTelemetry Profile representing a continuous profiling snapshot

start_line.description: First line number of the function in source

OTel.Profiles.ProfileFunction.description: Function identity in a profiled binary

trace_id.description: Linked trace ID (16 bytes, W3C format)

OTel.Profiles.ProfileLink.description: Cross-signal link from profile sample to trace/span

OTel.Profiles.ProfileLocation.description: Code location within a profiled binary

memory_start.description: Start address of the mapping in virtual memory

filename_strindex.description: Filename string index of the mapped binary

OTel.Profiles.ProfileMapping.description: Memory mapping for a loaded binary or shared library

sample_type.description: Filter by sample type (e.g., cpu, alloc_objects, wall)

profile_frame_type.description: Filter by profile frame type (e.g., dotnet, jvm, cpython)

link_index.description: Link index into link table for cross-signal correlation

timestamps_unix_nano.description: Timestamps for each value in nanoseconds since epoch

location_indices.description: Location indices from leaf (index 0) to root

OTel.Profiles.ProfileStack.description: Ordered sequence of location indices forming a call stack

total_sample_count.description: Total sample count across all profiles

sample_count.description: Total sample count for this dimension

OTel.Profiles.ProfileStatsByDimension.description: Profile statistics for a specific dimension value

type_strindex.description: Type string index into string table

unit_strindex.description: Unit string index into string table

OTel.Profiles.ProfileValueType.description: Sample type descriptor (what was measured and in what unit)

OTel.Resource.Resource.description: Resource describes the entity producing telemetry

parent_span_id.description: Parent span identifier (null for root spans)

start_time_unix_nano.description: Start timestamp in nanoseconds since epoch

end_time_unix_nano.description: End timestamp in nanoseconds since epoch

resource.description: Resource describing the entity that produced this span

OTel.Traces.Span.description: OpenTelemetry Span representing a single operation in a distributed trace

time_unix_nano.description: Event timestamp in nanoseconds since epoch

OTel.Traces.SpanEvent.description: Event occurring during a span's lifetime

trace_state.description: Trace state of the linked span

OTel.Traces.SpanLink.description: Link to another span (e.g., batch processing)

OTel.Traces.SpanStatsByDimension.description: Span statistics for a specific dimension value

OTel.Traces.Trace.description: Complete trace containing all related spans

OTel.Traces.TraceSummary.description: Trace summary without the full span collection

Runner.Mcp.RunnerMcpBlobResourceContent.description: Base64-encoded resource content returned by an MCP server.

Runner.Mcp.RunnerMcpContent.description: One MCP content item. The type literal selects the required variant fields.

Runner.Mcp.RunnerMcpContentMetadata.description: Metadata shared by every MCP content variant.

Runner.Mcp.RunnerMcpEmbeddedResourceCont.description: A resource embedded in MCP content.

Runner.Mcp.RunnerMcpIcon.description: Icon metadata carried by MCP tools and resource links.

Runner.Mcp.RunnerMcpResourceContent.description: Exactly one MCP text or blob resource variant.

Runner.Mcp.RunnerMcpResourceContentMetad.description: Metadata shared by MCP text and blob resources.

Runner.Mcp.RunnerMcpResourceLinkContent.description: A link to a resource that an MCP server can read.

Runner.Mcp.RunnerMcpResourceReadRequest.description: Resource URI accepted by the runner's MCP projection.

Runner.Mcp.RunnerMcpResourceReadResponse.description: Stable qyl projection of an MCP resources/read result.

Runner.Mcp.RunnerMcpTask.description: Task returned by an MCP task-augmented tool call. ttl and pollInterval are encoded as milliseconds.

Runner.Mcp.RunnerMcpTaskMetadata.description: Task-augmentation metadata accepted on an MCP tool call. ttl is encoded as milliseconds.

Runner.Mcp.RunnerMcpTaskStatus.description: Lifecycle state of an MCP task returned by a task-augmented tool call.

Runner.Mcp.RunnerMcpTextContent.description: Text provided to or returned by an MCP model or tool.

Runner.Mcp.RunnerMcpTextResourceContent.description: Text resource content returned by an MCP server.

Runner.Mcp.RunnerMcpTool.description: Stable qyl projection of an MCP tool advertised by a runner resource.

Runner.Mcp.RunnerMcpToolCallRequest.description: Tool call accepted by the runner's MCP projection.

Runner.Mcp.RunnerMcpToolCallResponse.description: Stable qyl projection of an MCP tool-call result.

Runner.Mcp.RunnerMcpToolExecution.description: Execution metadata advertised for an MCP tool.

Runner.Mcp.RunnerMcpToolResultContent.description: The result of an MCP sampling tool invocation.

Runner.Mcp.RunnerMcpToolTaskSupport.description: Task-augmentation support advertised for an MCP tool.

Runner.Mcp.RunnerMcpToolUseContent.description: An MCP sampling request to invoke a tool.

Runner.Mcp.RunnerMcpToolsResponse.description: MCP tools currently advertised by a runner resource.

Runner.RunnerLogLine.description: One bounded child-process log line exposed by the runner.

Runner.RunnerLogStream.description: Origin stream for one captured child-process log line.

Runner.RunnerMcpServerInfo.description: Identity reported by a connected MCP server during initialization.

Runner.RunnerResourceKind.description: Kind of process or connection supervised by the local qyl runner.

Runner.RunnerResourceLifecycle.description: Lifecycle state of a resource supervised by the local qyl runner.

Runner.RunnerResourceState.description: Current client-visible state of one runner resource.

Streaming.HeartbeatEvent.description: Keep-alive event emitted while no new log is available.

Streaming.LogStreamEvent.description: One log delivered by the collector's live stream.
